user_prompt: stylized 3D cartoon render, warm-toned medieval/fantasy game UI, X3 Design System palette (cream parchment #F6E9C4 + warm wood backdrop #4D2E1A, button family yellow/green/blue/red/gold, prestige tier colors), hand-painted item icons rendered at 256×256 transparent, no flat colors. A vertical 1080x1920 portrait mobile game activity screen mockup for X3, a warm-toned medieval/fantasy SLG game, rendered as stylized 3D cartoon UI with hand-painted item icons and rich material textures (carved warm wood, polished brass trim, cream parchment panels), no flat colors. The screen shows a premium festival SKIN GACHA event built around a large CONCENTRIC DOUBLE-RING SPIN WHEEL. TOP: a carved warm-wood title banner across the top reading the event name, accented with gold #F0C74D foil lettering and a subtle drop shadow (not a full gold gradient), with a small carved countdown timer pill and a circular brass (?) rules button at the top-right corner. CENTER MAIN BODY: two concentric rotating reward rings filling the middle of the screen — an OUTER ring of segmented reward cells (12-16 segments) and an INNER ring of reward cells (8 segments), each cell holding a hand-painted reward icon framed by a quality border whose color follows the prestige tier system (blue #4D9EDE rare, green #4DB366 uncommon, purple #A666D9 epic, gold #F0C74D legendary); one outer cell and one inner cell are lit with a glowing selection highlight frame to show where the pointer can land, and a carved arrow pointer sits at the top of the wheel pointing inward; at the dead center is a big circular gold SPIN button (brass-rimmed, embossed, warm gold #F7D44A to #DBA833) reading SPIN. GRAND PRIZE SHOWCASE: a prominent rectangular cream-parchment showcase card pinned to the upper-mid area or as a floating banner displaying the headline SKIN reward — a glowing 3D city/island skin or hero skin render inside a legendary gold quality frame with sparkle particles and a 'GRAND PRIZE' ribbon, communicating rarity and desire. BELOW THE WHEEL: a draw-currency strip showing a lottery-ticket / token icon with an owned count on a small parchment pill, and two action buttons side by side — a yellow-gold SINGLE DRAW button and a brighter gold TEN-PULL (x10) button, each with a small cost label (ticket icon + number) on a green/gold button body with bottom shadow and edge highlight for volume. At the very bottom: a horizontal MILESTONE progress bar (cumulative draws reward track) with reward nodes (claimed checkmark, locked, and a final big gold milestone chest) and a small 'reward preview / probability' text link entry. Background: a warm festive scene backdrop in deep warm wood #4D2E1A with soft golden bokeh and banners, cream parchment #F6E9C4 panels layered on top, everything radiating a celebratory premium-monetization 'big rare prize, want-to-spin' atmosphere. Palette strictly anchored to the X3 design tokens: cream parchment #F6E9C4 / #EFDCC1, warm wood #4D2E1A, button yellow #F7D44A, gold #F0C74D, green #4DB366, blue #4D9EDE, red #D94D4D, and prestige tier colors blue/green/purple/gold; title uses gold #F0C74D accents only, not a full gold gradient. Display title text in a heavy Sans bold typeface. title text in Alibaba Sans KR Bold or PuHuiTi Bold, may use #F0C74D gold accent (NOT a full gradient like X2), with subtle drop shadow on darker backgrounds

params.negative_prompt: no Pixar style, no painterly thick brush strokes, no realistic photography, no anime CG / no manga lineart, no flat / minimal / Material design feel, no neon / cyberpunk, no purple background unless requested, no media query responsive, no raw hex outside design tokens, no full title gold gradient — X3 is not as gilded as X2

error.message: GRFal 鉴权失败：HTTP 403 权限不足(需 scope grfal:api:call)，auth-bootstrap 返回 401 未登录。全局 call_grfal.py 走 Bearer/设备流鉴权(不读 GRFAL_COOKIE)，需在交互终端重新登录授权；且项目 vendored Cookie 版 call_grfal.py 缺失、art-skills fallback 未安装(无 art_token)。请重新授权 GRFal 后重派。
